ideation: This sequence mimics carefully holding a valuable amphora.  The robot will hold it out in front of them to showcase the object, then carefully lower it to a resting position. Frame 1 shows both arms in a neutral position. Frame 2 shows both arms extended forward and slightly upward to cradle the amphora. Frame 3 shows the amphora lowering to rest in front of the robot. Frame 4 shows both arms returning to a neutral position.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely at the sides
arms extend forward, presenting the amphora
arms carefully lower the precious object
arms return to a relaxed, neutral pose
